text:
Created attachment 255836
Poudriere log file

Hello

I'm using Poudriere to build the Port but I get an error because of conflicting node versions.

Tested with 14.1-RELEASE and 14.2-RELEASE. 

Build commands:
root@fbsd01 ~# cat poudriere_build_list
multimedia/jellyfin
root@fbsd01 ~# poudriere bulk -j 142Ramd64 -p HEAD -f poudriere_build_list

Attached poudriere log.
